name: Apple Onion Rye ABM
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring all ingredients to room temperature and pour into a bakery bowl in the following order.
2. Set "baking control" at 10 o'clock. Select "white bread" and press Start.
3. In hot and humid weather, use 1/8 cup less water.
4. This lightly sweet, fruity rye tastes good with scrambled eggs or in a turkey sandwich. For tea sandwiches, slice thin and spread with cream cheese and toasted sliced almonds.
